metastatic_emissary.desc: Fast and aggressive — embodying the spread of cancer.
metastatic_emissary.name: Metastatic Emissary

metastaza.desc: Dangerous boss capable of spreading cancer
metastaza.name: Metastasis

immune_saboteur.desc: Sabotages the immune system, creating an immunosuppressive environment.
immune_saboteur.name: Immune Saboteur

oncogenic_signal.desc: Mutated genes sending constant growth signals.
oncogenic_signal.name: Oncogenic Signal

onkogen_prime.desc: Enhanced oncogene version with advanced mutation abilities
onkogen_prime.name: Oncogene Prime

primary_clone.desc: The first tumor cell that began dividing uncontrollably.
primary_clone.name: Primary Clone

radiation_core.desc: Concentrated radiation source causing massive damage
radiation_core.name: Radiation Core

tumor_core.desc: The ultimate cancer cell — defeating it means a cure.
tumor_core.name: Tumor Core

angiogenic_heart.desc: The beating core of the tumor's vascular network.
angiogenic_heart.name: Angiogenic Heart

resistant_clone.desc: Adapts to treatment — the harder you hit, the tougher it gets.
resistant_clone.name: Resistant Clone

adrenal_surge.desc: Provides temporary boost to all abilities
adrenal_surge.name: Adrenaline Surge

protein_cache.desc: Concentrated protein providing large XP amount
protein_cache.name: Protein Cache

artillery_fungus.desc: Elite fungus shooting explosive spores at long range
artillery_fungus.name: Elite Artillery Fungus

micro_shooter.desc: Elite version of micro shooter with enhanced fire rate
micro_shooter.name: Elite Micro Shooter

rapid_divider.desc: Extremely fast elite tumor cell variant.
rapid_divider.name: Rapid Divider

signal_amplifier.desc: Elite signal cell with enhanced firepower.
signal_amplifier.name: Signal Amplifier

speed_virus.desc: Extremely fast elite virus with dash abilities
speed_virus.name: Elite Speed Virus

tank_cell.desc: Heavily armored elite cell with regenerating shield
tank_cell.name: Elite Tank Cell

toxic_mortar.desc: Elite exploding cell with massive range.
toxic_mortar.name: Toxic Mortar

aberrant_cell.desc: Elite cell with disrupted structure and high resistance
aberrant_cell.name: Aberrant Cell

angio_sprout.desc: Builds the vascular network feeding the tumor.
angio_sprout.name: Angio Sprout

apoptosis_bomb.desc: Tumor cell weaponizing programmed cell death.
apoptosis_bomb.name: Apoptosis Bomb

basic_cell.desc: The simplest type of cancer cell
basic_cell.name: Basic Cell

efflux_pump.desc: Expels drugs from the cell — fast and hard to hit.
efflux_pump.name: Efflux Pump

fungal_parasite.desc: Drains health and releases spores on death
fungal_parasite.name: Fungal Parasite

metastasis_runner.desc: Fast cell spreading cancer over long distances
metastasis_runner.name: Metastasis Runner

micro_shooter.desc: Small cell attacking with precise ranged projectiles
micro_shooter.name: Micro Shooter

micro_shooter_enhanced.desc: Enhanced micro shooter with dual projectile attack
micro_shooter_enhanced.name: Micro Shooter Enhanced

mutant_cell.desc: Genetically unstable cell that evades and enrages when threatened.
mutant_cell.name: Mutant Cell

purple_support.desc: Supports nearby cells with its abilities
purple_support.name: Oncogene

regulatory_cell.desc: Suppresses immune response and shields nearby tumor cells.
regulatory_cell.name: Regulatory Cell

shielding_helper.desc: Support cell providing shields to nearby enemies
shielding_helper.name: Shielding Helper

signal_cell.desc: Cell sending growth signals to nearby tumor cells.
signal_cell.name: Signal Cell

viral_swarm.desc: Fast viral organism attacking in groups
viral_swarm.name: Viral Swarm

viral_swarm_alpha.desc: Enhanced viral swarm variant with higher speed
viral_swarm_alpha.name: Viral Swarm Alpha

default.desc: Main character fighting against cancer cells
default.name: Mard

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.desc: Lightning chains between enemies, hitting multiple targets.

ion_therapy.name: Ion Therapy
ion_therapy.desc: Charged particle beam chains between nearby enemies.

chemo_reservoir.desc: Chemical reservoir providing sustained treatment effects
chemo_reservoir.name: Chemo Reservoir

homing_shot.desc: Projectiles automatically home in on the nearest enemy.
homing_shot.name: Homing Shot

flamethrower.desc: Cone of fire in front of player
flamethrower.name: Flamethrower

oxidative_burst.name: Oxidative Burst
oxidative_burst.desc: Neutrophil-like oxidative damage in a cone ahead.

metabolic_haste.desc: Accelerates metabolic processes for increased speed
metabolic_haste.name: Metabolic Haste

xp_magnet.desc: Automatically collects XP from greater distance
xp_magnet.name: XP Magnet

synaptic_pulse.desc: Periodic AoE damage pulse from your position.
synaptic_pulse.name: Synaptic Pulse

orbital_antibodies.desc: Projectiles orbit around you, damaging enemies on contact.
orbital_antibodies.name: Orbital Antibodies

chemo_pool.desc: Creates a damage zone on the ground that hurts enemies.
chemo_pool.name: Chemo Pool

cytotoxin_enhanced.desc: Powered-up toxic projectile with greater range
cytotoxin_enhanced.name: Enhanced Cytotoxin

cytotoxin_small.desc: Smaller cytotoxin variant for rapid attacks
cytotoxin_small.name: Small Cytotoxin

player_basic.desc: Standard projectile fired by the player
player_basic.name: Player Basic Projectile

boss.chemorezistence: Chemoresistant boss resistant to treatment with multiple attack phases
boss.genova_mutace: Genetically mutating boss altering DNA structure during combat
boss.karcinogenni_kral: Powerful carcinogenic king ruling over cancer cells
boss.onkogen: Oncogenic mutation causing changes in genetic code
boss.radiation: Radiation syndrome causing continuous radiation damage
boss.angiogenic_heart: Beating core of the tumor vascular network wielding beams and blood pulses
boss.tumor_core: Ultimate tumor core combining all hallmarks of cancer — 5 phases, radiation aura, beam sweeps, dash attacks, minion summons and core overload

powerup.damage_boost: Damage boost enhancing all attacks for more effective combat
powerup.explosive_bullets: Proton Cannon - bullets explode on impact dealing area damage
powerup.flamethrower: Cone of fire damaging enemies in front of player
powerup.piercing_arrows: Cisplatin projectiles piercing through multiple enemies
powerup.shield: Immune system shield absorbing incoming damage

projectile.basic: Basic projectile for standard attack maneuvers

cancer_stem_cell.desc: Rare cell crucial for tumor survival.
cancer_stem_cell.name: Cancer Stem Cell

golden_cell.desc: Rare golden cell providing large rewards
golden_cell.name: Golden Cell

mutagen_splicer.desc: Adaptive enemy changing abilities during combat
mutagen_splicer.name: Mutagen Splicer

necrocyte_sentinel.desc: Necrotic guardian with decay aura and summoning abilities
necrocyte_sentinel.name: Necrocyte Sentinel

phage_overlord.desc: Dominant entity spreading viral infections through projectiles
phage_overlord.name: Phage Overlord

radiomorph_titan.desc: Massive radiation mutant with phase shifting
radiomorph_titan.name: Radiomorph Titan

rainbow_virus.desc: Mystical virus changing colors with unique abilities
rainbow_virus.name: Rainbow Virus

tumor_sentinel.desc: Tumor guardian spawning minions and protecting allies.
